summary: Fun-line animations must be improved. The current graphics/assets used are not at the required standard.

requests.summary: Improve fun-line animations so the visual quality of the graphics/assets reaches the expected project standard.
constraints: focus on the graphics/assets and resulting animation quality
current graphics used are below the required standard
the improvement must raise the visual standard rather than only making technical fixes
acceptance: graphics/assets used for the animations are at a higher standard than the current version
the resulting animation quality is no longer below project expectations
